ddls:
CREATE TABLE "aircraft" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "number_and_name" TEXT /* Number and name designation of the aircraft */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the aircraft (e.g., fighter, bomber) */,
  "wheels_gauge" TEXT /* Wheel gauge of the aircraft */,
  "builder" INTEGER /* Builder name and year of construction */,
  "year_built" TEXT /* Year built or range of years for construction */,
  "location_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or location information */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number for the aircraft */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine used in the aircraft */,
  "wing_span" REAL /* Wingspan of the aircraft in meters */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the aircraft in meters */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the aircraft in meters */,
  "max_speed" REAL /* Maximum speed of the aircraft in km/h */,
  "service_ceiling" REAL /* Service ceiling of the aircraft in meters */,
  "range" REAL /* Range of the aircraft in kilometers */,
  "crew_capacity" INTEGER /* Number of crew members */,
  "passenger_capacity" INTEGER /* Number of passengers (if applicable) */,
  "historical_notes" TEXT /* Additional historical notes or context */,
  "current_condition" TEXT /* Current condition of the aircraft (e.g., operational, non-operational, under restoration) */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date when the aircraft was acquired by the museum */,
  "acquisition_method" TEXT /* Method of acquisition (e.g., donation, purchase, transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aircraft_builder FOREIGN KEY ("builder") REFERENCES builders ("builder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "builders" (
  "builder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each builder */,
  "builder_name" TEXT /* Name of the builder company */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the builder */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the builder was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the builder */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("builder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restoration_records" (
  "restoration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restoration record */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft being restored */,
  "date_started" TEXT /* Date when the restoration started */,
  "date_completed" TEXT /* Date when the restoration was completed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the restoration work done */,
  "restorer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person or team responsible for the restoration */,
  "estimated_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the restoration */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost of the restoration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the restoration (e.g., in progress, completed, on hold) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments on the restoration process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restoration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restoration_records_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restoration_records_restorer_id FOREIGN KEY ("restorer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location within the museum */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates of the location (e.g., latitude and longitude) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Number of aircraft that can be displayed in the location */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Description of amenities available in the location (e.g., restrooms, seating) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., staff, researcher, public) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the aircraft record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_significance" (
  "significance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each significance record */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft related to the event */,
  "event" TEXT /* Event associated with the aircraft */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the historical significance */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the information (e.g., historical document, interview) */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Whether the information has been verified */,
  "verified_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who verified the information */,
  "verification_date" TEXT /* Date when the information was verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("significance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_significance_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "photos" (
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each photo */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft associated with the photo */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the photo */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the photo */,
  "date_taken" TEXT /* Date when the photo was taken */,
  "photographer" TEXT /* Name of the photographer */,
  "copyright" TEXT /* Copyright information for the photo */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the photo (e.g., 1920x1080) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("photo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_photos_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id")
)
